old_system.note: RSS servlet ล่มช่วงกลางวัน, กลับมา ~18:00

new_system.status: stable — 20/20 burst avg 205ms, no throttling observed
new_system.note: parallel-run กับ old system, likely canonical future platform

getProcureResult.note: Winner data without auth — key for awarded_jobs

announcement_list.note: HOLY GRAIL — announcement list/search gate, Cloudflare protected. TODO: find params

sumProjectMoneyAndCount.note: budgetYear IS a working filter. All-time=68.4M, 2568=6.77M, 2567=6.64M, 2566=6.25M, 2565=5.79M. announceType/stepId/deptId params ignored. POST=405.

csv_export.note: GET=405, POST with body returns {validateCfTurnTile:false} — same Cloudflare gate as /announcement listing

getProcurementDetail.note: Found in Angular bundle — similar to getProjectDetail?

listProcureMethod.note: All procurement methods (ตกลงราคา, สอบราคา, ประกวดราคา ...)

app-hidden.note: Returns CSRF token — called on every Angular init

egp-aann09-web.note: Angular remote entry — exposes ./Announcement and ./Home1 modules

egp-aann23-service.note: Service alive (returns JSON 404 with timestamp). All tested paths 404. /actuator/* blocked by WAF (ConnectionReset). No Swagger/OpenAPI. Need Angular bundle analysis to find paths.

egp-project-service.note: Root GET 200 — {data: 'appInfo: egp-project-service, env:prod'}. All path patterns 404 (pb/a-egp-project, /project, /api). /actuator/* blocked by WAF. Need bundle analysis to find actual path prefix.

rss_feeds.reliability: ~40% during Thai business hours, ~95% at night
rss_feeds.role: Primary discovery feed — finds new projectIds
rss_feeds.note: Intermittent, home IP required (GHA IPs blocked)

todo_investigate: egp-aann23-service — extract path prefix from Angular bundle chunk analysis
egp-project-service — extract path prefix from Angular bundle (chunk 594 or remoteEntry.js)
/announcement listing — Cloudflare Turnstile required; cannot unlock without browser/token. Options: (a) Playwright+Turnstile solve, (b) accept RSS as discovery layer
/announcement/csv — POST method, Cloudflare-gated same as /announcement listing
sumProjectMoneyAndCount — budgetYear filter confirmed; explore methodId/provinceId format to unlock finer counts

conclusions_2026_05_25.rss_vs_process5: RSS = discovery layer (finds new projectIds), process5 REST = detail layer (getProjectDetail + getProcureResult without auth). This two-tier architecture is correct and stable.
conclusions_2026_05_25.cloudflare_gate: Announcement listing (/announcement, /csv) requires Cloudflare Turnstile in prod. bypassCloudflareStatus=N. No workaround without browser automation.
conclusions_2026_05_25.database_scale: 68.4M records all-time. budgetYear=2568 → 6.77M. Confirms national procurement database is comprehensive.
conclusions_2026_05_25.process5_stability: 10 microservices confirmed. getProjectDetail avg 205ms, no throttling at 20-burst. WAF blocks /actuator/* but API paths remain open.
